creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
In preparation to commit a new port (Fedora Core 6) the repocopy
	emulators/linux_base-fc4 -> emulators/linux_base-fc6 is needed.

Fix: 

Please, 
	. do the repocopy emulators/linux_base-fc4 -> emulators/linux_base-fc6;
	. then assign this PR to me.

	Thanks!

WBR
-- 
bsam
